pkgmetadata.longdescription:
G2P (grapheme-to-phoneme) engine designed for Kokoro TTS models. English support pulls in spaCy + spacy-curated-transformers for sentence segmentation, plus phonemizer-fork as the espeak-ng bridge. Direct dep of dev-python/kokoro.
Capped at python_requires<3.13 by upstream — single-impl py3.12 in this overlay until that cap is verified stale.
